vulnerabilities.description: User input is injected into an HTML attribute without proper encoding. Supplying a value like: %22%20autofocus%20onfocus=alert(1)%20x breaks out of the value attribute and adds event-handler attributes, confirming XSS via attribute injection.
Server header reveals internal framework and versions (Werkzeug/1.0.1 Python/2.7.18), indicating outdated runtime and providing attackers useful version info.
